title: Startup splash screen not centered if display scale > 100%
author: bruste77
body_snippet:
If I set my display scale to 125% splash screen is not centered.
I tried to change WindowStartupLocation attribute to "CenterScreen" in FrmSplashScreenNew.xaml and to comment all code to center it in Programroot.cs and it worked with scale 100% and 125%.

iterations.description: Splash screen misalignment on HiDPI/scaled displays is a common and reproducible cosmetic bug affecting many modern setups.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (claude): Splash screen misalignment on HiDPI/scaled displays is a common and reproducible cosmetic bug affecting many modern setups.
Approach: Set StartPosition to Manual and calculate center using Screen.PrimaryScreen.WorkingArea with DPI-aware scaling factor, or use SetDesktopLocation with DPI-compensated coordinates.
